reviews.text:
The most valuable advice we received was "the best plan is no plan".  And while preparation is essential, Sean's perspective gave us the opportunity to live in the moment and adapt to the ever changing mountain weather effortlessly.

From the very first phone call, Sean listened to our thoughts and questions, offering the support and direction needed to make our elopement truly memorable. He provided the space for us to be creative and flexible; not only is he one of the coolest dudes we've ever spent time with, he was incredibly patient with our semi- thought out plans and my own lack of confidence on skis.

The pictures reflect a day that was far beyond our expectations.  Sean captured moments that represented our elopement perfectly-from breathtaking and fun to the completely unexpected.  Thank you, Sean, for sharing your your incredible photography skills, your great attitude and our special day with us.

I absolutely loved working with Sean. I found Vows and Peaks on Instagram about two years ago, right before I got engaged. I knew I wanted to hire Sean based on the excitement of adventure and his photos. After our initial call I could tell the vibe was a fit as well. He made the whole experience very simple by planning the adventure and providing a ton of information on what to pack, vendor recommendations, etc. Sean did a great job capturing our day and making it unique to us. I highly recommend Sean/ Vows and Peaks!

From start to finish, our experience working with Sean at Vows & Peaks was so well-coordinated and fun. We found him through a Google search and, out of the many results, his website and offerings spoke to us as the most authentic and genuine. He was incredibly quick to respond when we reached out for more information and took the time to get to know us and what we wanted from our elopement. He continued to be really responsive and helpful throughout the three months leading up to our big day. He sent us a really thorough guide with many great tips and next steps. He gave us fantastic options for potential locations to choose from and he made himself available for any questions we had.
On the day of, we found out just how fun and cool Sean actually is. We of course had a ton of jitters, but he brought such a light-hearted and relaxed energy that grounded us in a real way. He made sure we got up to our location safely and at our own pace. Once we were up there, we got to celebrate in literally whatever way we wanted and that's exactly why we wanted to elope. The location was STUNNING and Sean gave us the perfect amount of direction while giving us the freedom to just be ourselves and enjoy the moment.
We got sneak peek photos the day after that were so incredible we thought to ourselves "how can the full album top this?!" It definitely did, though. We got our full album a few months later and were SO happy with the results. Sean captured moments we otherwise wouldn't have noticed and all of it captured the most candid and beautiful parts of that day, from our vows on a cliff ledge to our hike back down in my dress and Tevas. Sean helped make the experience everything we hoped for and now we get to relive it through his photos. Definitely hire this guy. He's a gem.

Words can't begin to express how amazing Sean is and how happy we are with our experience. My husband and I had a small intimate wedding with 15 of our closest friends and family. We found Sean early on in our wedding planning and knew we wanted to work with him right away. At our first meeting, we envisioned our perfect day from start to end which included a private vow ceremony, epic views, and a celebration with our loved ones. What Sean delivered was everything we dreamed of and more. Sean guided us every step of the way making the process as stress-free as possible. He also referred us to most of our vendors who were all excellent choices. Sean is organized, professional, down to earth, and overall just a great human being. What set him apart was his ability to make our day feel special and organic without feeling like a production. On the day of our wedding, we were able to live in the moment and fully enjoy our time together and with our loved ones. As an expert photographer, Sean was able to capture the magic of our day perfectly and we are obsessed with our album. Sean, we can't thank you enough and are forever grateful!

Working with Sean was an absolute dream! We came across Vows and Peaks when we first got engaged and knew he was the perfect fit right away. Sean is so dedicated to his work and it was evident that he has a passion for elopement photography. His communication with us leading up to it was incredible and he was always available to answer all of our questions. The few days leading up to our big day there were flood warnings all around the area we planned to be in. On the day of, we made a solid attempt to stick to our original plan, but due to the weather we had to pivot. Sean was so calm and prepared with alternative locations that there was never a moment of panic or stress (and I’m very prone to stressing!). Our new locations were even more amazing than we could’ve imagined. As someone who feels incredibly awkward in front of a camera, Sean makes it so easy and natural. At the end of the day, I felt like I never even saw him taking photos because we were so in the moment. It’s safe to say I was blown away by the amount of amazing photos he captured (and how quickly we got our sneak peek photos!). Sean has that energy that makes you feel calm & comfortable as if you’re hanging out with an old friend. I am so so incredibly grateful that Sean was able to capture every emotion throughout the day so we can relive it over and over again. Our elopement was truly an adventure we will never forget and we couldn’t thank him enough!
